name: Derbyshire Fruit Loaf (English)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the dried fruit and sugar into a mixing bowl.
2. Add the hot tea and leave to soak overnight.
3. The next day, preheat the oven to 300°F (150°C) or Mark 2.
4. Grease and line a 7-inch cake tin or two 1 lb loaf tins.
5. Stir the egg, flour, spices, and marmalade into the fruit, sugar, and tea mixture.
6. Pour the mixture into the cake tin or loaf tins.
7. Bake for 1½ -2 hours until firm to the touch or until a skewer pushed into the cake comes out clean.
8. Do not open the oven during the first hour of baking time.
9. This cake will keep well.
